summary: A Google DeepMind announcement celebrating Demis Hassabis and John Jumper winning the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for their work on AlphaFold. The source includes a brief statement from Hassabis reflecting on his career dedication to AI and its potential to accelerate scientific discovery.

principles.statement: AI has unparalleled potential to improve the lives of billions of people and accelerate scientific discovery.
principles.rationale: This core belief is the driving force behind his career, with AlphaFold serving as the initial proof of concept for AI's transformative impact on science.
principles.source_quote: I’ve dedicated my career to advancing AI because of its unparalleled potential to improve the lives of billions of people.

signature_quotes.text: I’ve dedicated my career to advancing AI because of its unparalleled potential to improve the lives of billions of people.
signature_quotes.context: Statement released after being informed he won the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry.

signature_quotes.text: I hope we'll look back on AlphaFold as the first proof point of AI's incredible potential to accelerate scientific discovery.
signature_quotes.context: Reflecting on the legacy of AlphaFold upon winning the Nobel Prize.
